channel.title: Privacy on Sebastian Müller
channel.description: Recent content in Privacy on Sebastian Müller

item.title: Device independent AdBlock with Pi-Hole
item.description: Ads are annoying. Not only when trying to read morning news and more than half of the website is spammed with moving gifs (or flash ads, the worst kind of ads), but also they are able to spy on you and track you browsing behaviour. Of course, most people are using browser extensions like Adblock Plus or (my favorite) uBlock Origin. But what about your devices that do not support extensions?
